user.title: Connect to the M-Bus gateway file server
user.description: The gateway uploads HC2XML snapshot files to an FTP/SFTP server; enter its connection details.

data_description.port: Leave empty for the protocol default (21 for FTP/FTPS, 22 for SFTP).
data_description.directory: Directory containing the snapshot files, e.g. /mbus.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the file server

abort.already_configured: This server and directory are already configured

data.delete_after: Delete files from server after processing

data_description.file_pattern: Glob pattern of the gateway snapshot files, e.g. 0080A3DB81A5_*.xml.
data_description.require_rdy: Only ingest a snapshot once its matching .rdy marker exists, so half-uploaded files are never read.

generate_bill.name: Generate energy bill
generate_bill.description: Computes the energy bill for a period from the stored meter readings and writes it to /config/energy_meter_izar/bills/.

start.name: Start date
start.description: First day of the billing period (inclusive).

end.name: End date
end.description: End of the billing period (exclusive), e.g. 2026-04-01 for a bill through March.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Name of the export profile from billing.yaml. Defaults to the first configured profile.

formats.name: Formats
formats.description: Output formats, overriding the profile's formats.

no_entry_loaded.message: No Energy Meter IZAR gateway is set up and loaded.

invalid_period.message: The billing period end ({end}) must be after its start ({start}).

no_supported_format.message: None of the requested formats ({requested}) can be rendered yet; supported: {supported}.
